reviews.comment:
Hermosa YPF en la que hemos parado. Tiene un sector al aire libre muy bonito y amplio, no te sentis al costado de la ruta sino que podes sentarte a comer algo o tomar un mate tranquila.

(Translated by Google)
A beautiful YPF station where we stopped. It has a very nice and spacious outdoor area; you don't feel like you're on the side of the road, but you can sit down and have something to eat or drink some mate in peace.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM5dU1yZkxnEAE

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar, los baños muy limpios, el playero muy profesional.
Los chicos que atienden el local....humm, les falta algo de mejor atención.

(Translated by Google)
Nice place, the restrooms are very clean, and the attendant is very professional.
The guys who work there... well, they could be a bit more attentive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM5bU1YNktnEAE

reviews.comment:
Paramos a descansar y almorzamos en la parrilla. Pedimos sándwich de bondiola y choripanes, con papas fritas. Riquísimo todo

(Translated by Google)
We stopped to rest and had lunch at the grill. We ordered pork shoulder sandwiches and chorizo ​​sandwiches with fries. Everything was delicious.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM5Nk5UM3R3RRAB
